name: Cold and Creamy Chicken and Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly saute the chicken breasts until tender. Cut into strips about 1/2-inch wide and 2 inches long.
2. Bring the water to a boil over high heat and add the salt.
3. Add the pasta and turn the heat to medium until the pasta is tender, not mushy.
4. Drain and rinse with cold water. Set aside.
5. Mix together salt, sour cream, mayonnaise, dill weed, black pepper, and parmesan cheese. Allow to set for 15 minutes so that the flavors all blend together.
6. Peel and pit the ripe avocados. Slice into half-inch strips, lengthwise.
7. Mix the chicken strips, pasta, and dressing in a large bowl. The mixture should be slightly juicy. Gently stir in the avocados so they don't break up.
8. Allow the mixture to set overnight so that the pasta absorbs the dressing. If the mixture is dry the next day, add mayonnaise so that it is slightly wet. Taste for seasonings.
9. To serve: place chicken pasta mixture in a chilled serving bowl and garnish top with ripe tomato wedges. Sprinkle with a small amount of dill weed.
